series_metadata.series_description: Contractual agreements between Board and third parties, e.g. personal service contracts, servicing of equipment.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for 2 years or until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released, whichever is later. ; Electronic: Retain for 2 years or until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released, whichever is later., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
